raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ras nu tohs irr jadedsi-
najs / tam buhs favas Drehbes
masgaht / un favu Meeſu ar Uh-
deni pehrt / un pehz to lai tas Leh-
geri nahk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas lai jums par Lik-
kumu irr muhschaim / ſeptitâ Meh-
nefi Defmitâ Mehnes Deenâ buhs
jums favu Meeſu mehrdeht / un
ne kahdu Darbu darriht / tik labbi
tas / kas tai Semmê dſimnis / ka
tas Sweschineeks / kas juhfu Star-
pâ ka Swefchineeks mahjo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ſchaï Deenâ buhs win-
nam preeſsch jums Salihdsina-
ſchanu darriht juhs ſchkihſtiht / no
wiſſeem juhfu Grehkeem buhs
jums ta KUNGA Preeſschâ
ſchkikſtiteem tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schi laid jums irr weena
itt augſta Duﬀeschanas-Deena /
ka juhs juhfu Meeſu mehrdejat /
tas irr tweens Likkums muhscham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un taim Preesteram / kas
fwaidihts irr / un ka Rohka pildi-
ta irr / ka wiꞥſch favu Tehwa
Weetâ par Preestert effus / buhs
to Salihdsinaſchanu darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnam buhs tahs lin-
nu Drehbes/tahs ſivehtasDrehbes
apwilkt / ta buhs winnam falihdsi-
naht tahs ſivehtasWeetasSweh-
tunu / un to Sa-eefchanas Telti /
un to Altari / un winnam buhs
par teem Preestereem / un preeſsch
tahs Draudses Laudin Salihdsi-
naschanu darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un taim buhs jums par
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "weenn Likkumu buht muhscham/
ka juhs preeſsch Israëta Behr-
neem Salihdsinaschanu darrat /
no wiſſeem winnu Grehkeem
weenreifi Gadskahrtâ. Un Moh-
sus darrija / ka tas KUNGS
winnam bij pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XVII. Nodalla.
Deewa Likkumi preeſsch teem Preestereem : 1.
Ka ween weenigi preeſsch tahs Sa-eefchanas
Telts : 3. Zaur ihſteeneem Preestereem ja-
uppure : 6. Ne teem Johbeem bet tam
KUNGAM : 17. Ta Aſfinu-Eſchana toſp
atkaf aisleegea : 10. Ir to Maitu/kaß no
Swehreem ſaplohsita : 15.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tas KUNGS run-
naja us Mohsu / un
fazzija :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Runna us Aäronu un us
winna Dehleem / un us wiſſeem
Israëta Behrneem / un fakki us
teem : Schis irr tas Wahrdß / ko
tas KUNGS pawehlejs / fazzi-
dains :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Itweens / kas no Israëta
Namma Lehgeri kahdu Wehrſi /
jeb Telſu / jeb Kasu nokaus / jeb ko
ahra preeſsch Lehgera nokaus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to ne neſſihs preeſsch
tahs Sa-eefchanas Telts Dur-
wint / uppuredams tam KUN-
GAM weenu Uppuri preeſsch ta
KUNGA Dſihwoſſa / tain Wih-
ram taps tas Affins peelahga-
dihts / itt ka buhtu wiſſch Affini
islehjis / tapehz buhs tain Wih-
ram iſdeldetam tapt no ſaweeim
Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht kad Israëta Behr-
ni favus Uppneus neß / ko tee
us Tihrunu nokauj / ka teem buhs
toh
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
